title: moraea hiemalis
intro: Moraea hiemalis, also known as the winter iris or snow iris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Moraea hiemalis include its potential to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its use as a natural expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Moraea hiemalis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
